storyboard.content: I get strange tingling and numbness that starts in my fingertips and travels up both arms.
My fingers feel clumsy and I have started dropping things more often.
My handwriting has gotten noticeably messier over the past few months.
The symptoms have been slowly getting worse over about six months.
It moderately affects my daily life, especially anything that needs fine hand movements, but I can still go to work.
The tingling and clumsiness are worst in the morning and improve somewhat as the day goes on.
